full_text:
Liu Yin (Xiuran) 柳隱 (休然)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yin (柳隱), styledXiuran (休然), was born in Chengdu. Held his post in Hanzhong even as the rest of it had fallen. Liu Yin was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom, the Wei Kingdom, and the Jin Dynasty.
